title: ruehssia neriifolia
intro: Ruehssia neriifolia, also known as the Nerium oleander, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dogbane family, Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is known to have several health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, lowering blood pressure, and acting as a natural remedy for various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Ruehssia neriifolia are commonly used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to use caution and consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
